summary: Fantastic‑sounding tape of a classic ’85 show, highlighted by standout drum solo breakouts.
review: The new source for this 1985 recording is praised as “fantastic sounding,” delivering clear audio despite the tape having been used many times. Reviewers especially love the Drumz and the special breakout jams that make this show a go‑to performance from that year.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed, positive review (4 stars) highlights both excellent audio quality and strong musical moments, leading to a solid but not exceptional rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: New source transfer is described as fantastic sounding; tape shows wear from repeated use but remains clear and enjoyable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The performance flows well, with the drum solos and breakout jams providing energetic peaks that define the show.

band_member_comments.Drums: Drum solos (Drumz) are highlighted as special breakouts and a major highlight of the performance.
